title: 7 Ways a Man of God Goes First
caption:
Leadership isn't what you hold. It's what you do first.

The apology, the hard conversation, the cost nobody wanted to take. Real leadership is going first into those — before anyone asks you to.

Save this. Pick one this week.

#leadership #christianmen #godlymanhood #faith #manofgod #ethos
theme: He leads by going first into the cost.
